display.purpose: Hero numbers and top-level wordmarks. Rare in product surfaces.

title.purpose: Card headers, dialog titles. Tight line-height; titles do not wrap.

body.purpose: Default reading text. Wrap at 65 to 75ch.

label.purpose: Form labels and buttons. Emphasized variant (700) is the typical button face.

mono.purpose: Code, package names, version strings, keyboard chords.

shadows.name: level-1
shadows.purpose: Smallest hover lift for buttons inside dense data tables.

shadows.name: level-1-dark
shadows.purpose: Dark-mode hover lift; ambient layer is heavier on dark.

motion.name: duration-instant
motion.purpose: Immediate change (toggle the variable, no transition).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Micro-feedback: button press scale, switch knob travel.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Default for hover, focus ring, color change, theme swap.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Drawer open, modal entry, tab indicator slide.

motion.name: easing-standard
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for all state changes.

motion.name: easing-emphasized
motion.purpose: Slower-starting ease-out for emphasized motion (modal entry).

motion.name: easing-decelerate
motion.purpose: Pure decelerate for objects coming to rest.

motion.name: easing-spring
motion.purpose: Rare playful overshoot; reserved for celebratory micro-moments. Default no.

motion.name: focus-ring-width
motion.purpose: Standard focus-visible ring width across all interactive components.

motion.name: focus-ring-offset
motion.purpose: Gap between component edge and focus ring.

components.name: Solid Button (Primary)
components.description: The single decisive action per screen. Cobalt fill, white ink, 8px radius, 38px medium height.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 38px; padding: 0 12px; background: #2563EB; color: #FFFFFF; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Pretendard Variable', Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1D4ED8; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.85); outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #EEF0F2; color: #B1B3B5; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-btn-primary__trailing { width: 14px; height: 14px; margin-left: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action paired with a Solid primary. Transparent fill, ink text, 1px hairline border.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 38px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; color: #181A1C; border: 1px solid #E4E6E8; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Pretendard Variable', Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: rgba(24, 26, 28, 0.04); } .ds-btn-outline:active { background: rgba(24, 26, 28, 0.08); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.85); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action: Cancel, dismissive choices. Transparent fill, ink text, no border.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 38px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; color: #181A1C; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Pretendard Variable', Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(24, 26, 28, 0.04); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: rgba(24, 26, 28, 0.08); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.85); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Chip (Selected)
components.description: Active filter pill. Ash Ink fill, Paper White ink, no border. Inversion is the active signal.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 26px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Pretendard Variable', Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-chip--selected { background: #181A1C; color: #FFFFFF; border: 0; } .ds-chip--selected:hover { background: #313335; } .ds-chip--selected:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.85); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Chip (Default)
components.description: Inactive filter pill. Ash Cream fill, ink text, 1px hairline.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 26px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: 'Pretendard Variable', Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-chip--default { background: #F3F5F7; color: #181A1C; border: 1px solid #E4E6E8; } .ds-chip--default:hover { background: #EEF0F2; } .ds-chip--default:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.85); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default text field. Paper White fill, hairline border, ink text, subtle placeholder.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 0 14px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #181A1C; border: 1px solid #E4E6E8; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Pretendard Variable', Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 21px; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #787A7C; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(24, 26, 28, 0.18); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #2563EB; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.25); } .ds-input:disabled { background: #EEF0F2; color: #B1B3B5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Elevated content container. Paper White on Ash Cream pages; tonal step IS the elevation, not a shadow.
components.html:
결제 요약

플랜Pro 월간

결제 예정일2026-06-12
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; color: #181A1C; border: 1px solid #E4E6E8; border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; font-family: 'Pretendard Variable', Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card__head { padding-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid #EEF0F2; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card__title { margin: 0; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; } .ds-card__body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; } .ds-card__row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; margin: 0; font-size: 14px; } .ds-card__row span { color: #787A7C; } .ds-card__row strong { color: #181A1C; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Badge (Status)
components.description: Inline status indicator. Status-tinted background variants share shape: 4px radius, caption weight.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Pretendard Variable', Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0; line-height: 1; } .ds-badge--positive { background: rgba(0, 185, 107, 0.12); color: #00844D; } .ds-badge--negative { background: rgba(255, 64, 62, 0.1); color: #BB2523; } .ds-badge--warning { background: rgba(255, 132, 0, 0.12); color: #BB4500; } .ds-badge--neutral { background: #181A1C; color: #FFFFFF; }

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Underline tabs. Active: 2px Cobalt underline. Never use background fill for active tabs.
components.html: <nav class="ds-tabs" role="tablist"><button class="ds-tab ds-tab--active" role="tab" aria-selected="true">개요</button><button class="ds-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false">결제</button><button class="ds-tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false">사용량</button></nav>
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: inline-flex; gap: 0; border-bottom: 1px solid #E4E6E8; font-family: 'Pretendard Variable', Pretendard, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-tab { position: relative; padding: 10px 16px; background: transparent; color: #787A7C; border: 0; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-tab:hover { color: #181A1C; } .ds-tab--active { color: #181A1C; border-bottom-color: #2563EB; } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.85); outline-offset: 2px; border-radius: 4px; }

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggle. Cobalt fill when on, ink-faint track when off. Knob is a circle the height of the track.
components.css: .ds-switch { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; cursor: pointer; } .ds-switch__input { position: absolute; opacity: 0; width: 1px; height: 1px; } .ds-switch__track { position: relative; width: 36px; height: 22px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #E4E6E8; transition: background-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-switch__knob { position: absolute; top: 2px; left: 2px; width: 18px; height: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: #FFFFFF; box-shadow: 0px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-switch__input:checked ~ .ds-switch__track { background: #2563EB; } .ds-switch__input:checked ~ .ds-switch__track .ds-switch__knob { transform: translateX(14px); } .ds-switch__input:focus-visible ~ .ds-switch__track { outline: 2px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.85); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
Orbit UI is the layer that disappears into the host product. It does not announce itself. A consumer drops in @heejun-com/theme-eclipse, ships their feature, and the system carries the weight of correctness, accessibility, and visual coherence without ever asking for attention. The aesthetic posture is consumer-led: this is a neutral palette and a calm typographic voice that amplifies whatever brand sits on top.

Every choice is made against a 56-component catalog rendered side by side. Color is restrained because a primary that screams will fight every consumer brand we sit under. Motion is sub-second because users are in a task. Elevation is whisper-soft because real depth would compete with the consumer's content. Korean and English type both must look intentional in the same paragraph, so we choose a Pretendard-first stack and never optical-tune to one script over the other.

What this system explicitly rejects, from PRODUCT.md: 과도한 그라데이션, 네온 색상, glassmorphism, 과한 애니메이션, 과한 민트·네온. Also rejected by category: the SaaS landing-page cliché (gradient hero, stat row, identical card grids), Tailwind-default indigo #6366F1 as a primary brand color, and dark mode 'because tools look cool dark.'
keyCharacteristics: Restrained color: tinted ash neutrals plus one calm cobalt accent, used on ≤10% of any screen.
Headless 3-tier tokens: reference → semantic → component. Consumers override at any tier without touching CSS.
Light by default, dark verified: every component ships with both modes, focus rings retuned per mode.
Pretendard-first typography: Korean and Latin glyphs balanced; weight contrast carries hierarchy.
Quiet motion: state changes only; 200ms standard, 320ms emphasized. No bounce, no choreography.
Substance over decoration: cards only when truly the best affordance, dividers via 1px hairlines, no shadows at rest.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: The Cobalt accent appears on ≤10% of any rendered screen. Use it for the single primary action, the focus ring, the current-selection indicator, and links. Never for icon decoration, never as a card background, never as a heading underline.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral is tinted toward the brand axis (cool, slight blue cast). Pure greys are forbidden. Reach for Ash Cream (#F3F5F7) or Carbon (#151719) as the page surface, never #fff or #000.

rules.name: The Status-Is-Not-Decoration Rule
rules.body: Coral, Amber, Green, Purple appear only where the semantic role applies. They are forbidden as accent decoration in headings, dividers, or illustrative graphics.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: The product never pairs two display families. Hierarchy is carried by weight (400 → 500 → 700) and scale ratio. Display fonts and editorial pairings are forbidden inside product surfaces.

rules.name: The Korean-Latin Parity Rule
rules.body: Pretendard is chosen because it tunes Korean and Latin glyphs to the same x-height and weight curve. Do not stack a Korean-only fallback before a Latin font.

rules.name: The 65ch Rule
rules.body: Body paragraphs wrap at 65–75 characters. Tables and dense UI may exceed this; reading surfaces must not.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: No element ships with a shadow at rest. Borders, color contrast, and surface tone do all default depth work. A button in its default state has zero box-shadow.

rules.name: The No-Glow Rule
rules.body: Decorative glows (color-tinted shadows, neon underglows, accent halos) are forbidden. Shadows are ambient gray only.

dos: Do reach for Cobalt (#2563EB) as the single brand accent. Use it on the primary action, focus ring, links, current-selection indicator. Stay ≤10% of any screen.
Do convey depth through tonal layering (Ash Cream below, Paper White above) plus 1px Hairline borders. Save shadows for genuine lifts (modal, dropdown, drag).
Do use the Pretendard-first stack and let weight contrast (400 / 500 / 700) carry hierarchy.
Do ship every interactive component with the seven states (default, hover, focus-visible, active, disabled, loading, error).
Do use 200ms standard easing (cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1)) for state transitions, 320ms emphasized for emphasized motions. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
Do wrap reading body at 65–75ch. Tables and dense UI may run wider.
Do ship Light and Dark mode together; verify both before review.
donts: Don't use Tailwind-default indigo (#6366F1) or its purple-leaning siblings as a primary brand accent. Cobalt (#2563EB) is the system blue.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a linear-gradient background). Use a single solid color; emphasize with weight or size.
Don't ship a hero-metric template (big number + small label, stat row, gradient accent). Replace with a spec table or editorial section.
Don't ship identical card grids stacked endlessly. Vary layout per section.
Don't apply side-stripe borders (border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent). Use a full border or a background tint.
Don't use glassmorphism (decorative backdrop-filter: blur glass surfaces) as a default. PRODUCT.md explicitly forbids it.
Don't use excessive gradients, neon, or mint/neon color (PRODUCT.md anti-references verbatim).
Don't use modals as the first thought. Exhaust inline, progressive disclosure, drawer, and popover alternatives.
Don't use decorative motion that does not convey state change, feedback, loading, or reveal.
Don't use em dashes (—) or double hyphens (--) in user-facing copy.
Don't use #000 or #fff as a page surface. Page surface is Ash Cream (#F3F5F7) in light, Carbon (#151719) in dark.
Don't introduce a second display family.
Don't add color-tinted shadows, neon underglows, or accent halos. Shadows are ambient gray only.
Don't invent fake terminals or decorative code-themed glyphs to dress up documentation. Show real components.
Don't describe the system as 'high-performance' or 'elegant'; let the components carry that claim.
